# teams app auth secret create

Generate a new client secret for an existing app

## Usage

```
teams app auth secret create [appId] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `appId` | App ID | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--env <path>` | [OPTIONAL] Path to credentials file (.env or appsettings.json) |
| `--env-file <path>` | [OPTIONAL] Alias for --env |
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
